keyPoints: Introduction to HIVE (Hadoop's In-DB Engine - Virtual In-Memory Engine)
Hive Architecture: MapReduce-based, Stores Data in HDFS
Data Types: String, Integer, Boolean, Date, Array, Map, Struct
Hive File Formats: Text, Avro, Parquet
Hive Query: Uses SQL-like syntax, Supports GroupBy, Join, and OrderBy
